name: the-butchering-art
description: Lindsey Fitzharris's The Butchering Art — learn how Joseph Lister transformed Victorian surgery through antisepsis, overcoming entrenched opposition to revolutionize medicine and save millions of lives
useCase: Helps anyone understand how paradigm-shifting innovation happens in the face of entrenched opposition — through the story of Joseph Lister's quest to bring antiseptic surgery to Victorian medicine.
knownRisks: Historical narrative — the scientific understanding has evolved significantly since Lister's time
